title: fragaria vesca var. alpina
intro: Fragaria vesca var. alpina, also known as the Alpine Strawberry or Woodland Strawberry, is a variety of wild strawberry native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation due to its high content of salicylic acid and flavonoids. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. alpina include its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
